title: [VPB] Drooling's WW2 Pack
description: Another WW2 content pack for Vic's Point Blank, planned to feature weapons from all major fronts and more!
body:
A World War 2 era addon pack for Vic's Point Blank, featuring some American, German, and Japanese Weapons, with more planned!

**REQUIRES VIC's POINT BLANK.**

Installation: Copy the install to the pointblank folder in your Minecraft root directory.

Currently Added:

US:
- M1 Garand
- M1 Carbine
- M1A1 Thompson
- M1928A1 Thompson
- M1918A2 Browning Automatic Rifle
- M1911A1 Pistol (Reanimated Vanilla)
- Mk.2 "Pineapple" Grenade
- M1903A4 Springfield

Soviet Union:

- Tokarev TT-33 Pistol
- PPSH-41 Sub Machine Gun
- M91/30 Mosin Nagant
- DP-27 Light Machine Gun
- RGD-33 Grenade

Germany:
- Kar98k Rifle
- MP40 Sub Machine Gun
- STG44 Assault Rifle
- Gewehr 43 Rifle
- MG42 Universal Machine Gun
- M24 Stick Grenade
- Luger P08 Pistol

Japan:
- Type 14 Nambu
- Type 100 SMG (Late War 1944 Pattern)
- Type 99 Arisaka Rifle
- Type 38 Arisaka Rifle
- Type 96 Light Machine Gun
- Type 99 Light Machine Gun
- Type 97 Grenade

Attachments:
- ZF39 Scope
- M73B1 "Weaver" Scope

Planned Weapons:
- Type 100 Early Sub Machine Gun
- MG34~~~~
- Eihandgranate 39
- M3/M3A1 Grease Gun
- M1A1 Carbine
- M1897 Trench Gun
- M1903A1 Springfield (with the long scope used by the USMC)
- PPS-43
- SVT-40
- Sten gun (Will have to decide on which variants come first)
- Bren gun
- Lee-Enfield No.4
- Webley Revolver
- Mills Bomb

Credits & Thanks:
- Vic, for all sounds and some animations are from the vanilla VPB mod. Also for both creating the base mod, template pack and tutorials.
- Corrineduck, for kindly remaking some of the animations (STG-44)
- ForgottenWeapons, for providing free detailed information on historical firearms.
